name: Chrissy
subtitle: You unlocked it. 🎉 Celebrating another incredible year of your journey — wishing you a day as brilliant as the code you write and as exciting as a flawless Anno city.
secret_message: 🎁 Secret unlocked! You already beat the game AND found this. Chrissy is unstoppable. Have the best birthday ever! 🎉
toast_messages: 🎂 Cheers, {name}!
🥂 Double cheers!
🎉 You're on a roll!
💜 Okay, we get it — you love the button.
🚀 MAXIMUM CELEBRATION ENGAGED
🌈 {name}.exe has entered PARTY MODE
🎊 Deploying birthday_vibes.tar.gz...
🧨 This is fine. Everything is fine.
👾 You broke the party button. Congrats.
🤖 ERROR 420: Too many cheers. Rebooting...
📦 npm install good-vibes — ████ 100%
🐛 Bug found: you cannot stop clicking. That's a feature, not a bug.
💡 Fun fact: Anno 1800 cities don't build themselves. Neither did this party.
🎮 Achievement unlocked: Serial Celebrator
🦆 A wild rubber duck appeared! Debug later.
☕ No breaks. More clicking.
🏗️ City build status: FLAWLESS. As always.
🇦🇹 Austrian engineering at its finest.
⭐ This button deserves a GitHub star.
🎵 *cue the bangers*
🔥 Hot deploy incoming... to your heart.
🌍 {name} appreciation post going viral in 3... 2... 1...
💾 Saving best memories... ████████░░ 80%
🎯 You were clickbaited. By love.
🎁 The real gift was the clicks we made along the way.
🛡️ No bugs on your birthday. That's an order.
🚢 git push --force birthday
📋 TODO: have an amazing day. Status: ✅ Done.
🎤 Drop the code and celebrate!!
💻 Ctrl+Z won't undo how awesome you are.
⚡ {name}.speed = Infinity
🌊 Riding the Anno trade routes on your birthday.
🏆 TypeScript would give this button a perfect type.
🎲 RNG seed: best_birthday_ever
🧠 Big brain. Big heart. Big birthday.
🔮 The future is bright — and full of confetti.
🚁 Happy Birthday from 30,000 ft of fun.
🌺 Side quest completed: being absolutely amazing.
🥳 This level of celebration is unprecedented.
🎸 Rock on, {name}. Rock on.
profile_messages: 💻 Currently busy building cool OSS stuff!
🎮 Or maybe in a Fortnite game right now...
🏙️ Building the perfect Anno trade route.
🌟 One of the rare actually cool devs.
💜 Okay you can stop now. Or don't. I'm a picture.

milestones.18: ⚡ You can feel it, can't you?
